title: Secure Shulkers
description: Secure Shulkers is designed to open shulker  boxes by sneaking and right-clicking while preventing item duplication.
body:
# Secure Shulkers

**Secure Shulkers** is designed to open shulker boxes by sneaking and right-clicking while preventing item duplication.

## 🔐 Features
- Open shulker boxes (block or item) by **sneaking and right-clicking**
- **Prevents duplication exploits** by:
  - Blocking interaction with the box item while open
  - Disabling hotbar slot switching
  - Blocking block interactions until the inventory is closed
- Automatically **saves changes** to the box's inventory (block or item)
- Cleans up tracking data on close or plugin disable

## ✅ Use Case
Ideal for servers that want to **secure shulker box usage** and **prevent common inventory exploits** used by cheaters or glitchers.
